definitions.title: Upload AI log

request_params.name: orderId
request_params.description: The order ID returned from your WEEX order API

request_params.name: stage
request_params.description: The trading stage where AI participated (e.g., "Strategy Generation")

request_params.name: model
request_params.description: The name or version of the AI model used (e.g., "GPT-4-turbo")

request_params.name: input
request_params.description: The prompt, query, or input text given to the AI model. If the input includes attachments (e.g., files, images), please provide links

request_params.name: output
request_params.description: The AI model's generated output, including predictions or decision recommendations. For inference models, show the inference process

request_params.name: explanation
request_params.description: A concise explanation summarizing the AI's analysis and reasoning in natural language. Maximum length: 1000 characters

response_params.name: data
response_params.description: Returned business data, "upload success" indicates upload successful

important_rules: BUIDLs entering the live trading phase must provide an AI log (ai_log) containing:
The AI log is required to verify AI involvement and compliance.
If you fail to provide valid proof of AI involvement, we will disqualify your team and remove it from the rankings.
Only approved UIDs on the official allowlist may submit AI log data.
